candidates.text: One thing I really like about @NucleusCodes is how simple they make getting started. You sign in with X. That’s it. No long forms to fill out. No referral links to chase. No whitelist applications or waiting around for approval. I feel like people don’t talk enough about how much friction kills good products. If it takes too many steps just to get in, a lot of people won’t even bother. Nucleus removes that completely. You connect your X account, your reputation is recognized, and you’re match...

candidates.text: Read It Once, It Works Immediately Lord, I may not know what the future holds, but I know You are in control, and Your plans for me are good. I surrender my plans, my fears, and my doubts to You this July. I know You will never give me more than I can bear, because where my strength ends, Yours begins. My Lord, I promise to share this prayer with at least one person. In Jesus' name, Amen. If God is the reason you have made it this far, put "Amen."

candidates.text: A topper who thinks every problem can be solved by studying harder is exactly why common sense isn’t part of the NEET syllabus. The people protesting aren’t trying to improve their scores, they’re trying to improve the system that decides them. The irony is that the freedom to say, “Why Go To Protest When I Could Study,” exists only because people before you chose to protest instead of staying silent.
